nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Lafresnaye's vanga
nodes.summary: Lafresnaye's vanga（Lafresnaye's vanga，学名 Xenopirostris xenopirostris），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: Madagascar spiny forests
nodes.summary: Madagascar spiny forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Long-tailed ground roller、Lafresnaye's vanga、Sickle-billed vanga，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits sub-arid thorn scrub, in the Madagascar spiny forests ecoregion, particularly areas with large amounts of dead wood, from sea level to

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It was uplisted from Least Concern to Near Threatened in 2022 as it is experiencing moderately rapid population decline owing to habitat degradation and loss within its range. The common name for the species is derived from the French ornithologist who described it, Frédéric de Lafresnaye
